get.description: Read-only jqcli auth status from server env.
Stream backtest progress events via SSE.

post.description: Submit simulation stub — jqcli simulation wiring deferred.

get.description: List threads for the current user.

post.description:
Create a new thread.

All fields are optional. If ``thread_id`` (or its ``threadId`` alias) is
omitted, the service generates a UUID. The request body may also be empty
or missing entirely.

get.description:
List all runs for a thread (owner-only).

Non-owners see the same response as no-runs; we don't disclose other users' runs.
Get a specific run by ID.

post.description: Create a run and stream events via SSE.

get.description: Legacy GET history — returns latest checkpoint messages.

schema.title: Response Get Thread History Api V1 Threads  Thread Id  History Get

post.description: Return checkpoint history in LangGraph SDK ThreadState shape.

schema.title: Response Post Thread History Api V1 Threads  Thread Id  History Post

get.description: Return latest thread state in LangGraph SDK shape.

schema.title: Response Get Thread State Api V1 Threads  Thread Id  State Get

post.description: Update thread state values and return the new ThreadState snapshot.

schema.title: Response Post Thread State Api V1 Threads  Thread Id  State Post

get.description:
Get aggregated memory context for the current user.

Returns all user memories and facts formatted for prompt injection.

List all registered skills.

Returns all available skills that can be executed by the agent.

post.description:
Register a new skill.

Creates a new skill definition that can be executed by the agent.

Args:
    body: Skill definition to register.

Returns:
    Created skill definition.

get.description:
Get skill details by name.

Args:
    skill_name: Name of skill to retrieve.

Returns:
    Skill definition.

Raises:
    404: If skill not found.

delete.description:
Unregister a skill.

Removes a skill from the registry.

Args:
    skill_name: Name of skill to remove.

Raises:
    404: If skill not found.

BacktestAuthStatusResponse.title: BacktestAuthStatusResponse
BacktestAuthStatusResponse.description: Auth-check status combining configured flag with credentials.

CreateThreadRequest.title: CreateThreadRequest
CreateThreadRequest.description:
Request body for creating a thread.

Accepts both snake_case (``thread_id``, ``model_name``) and the LangGraph
SDK camelCase alias (``threadId``). When both ``thread_id`` and
``threadId`` are provided, ``threadId`` (SDK) wins to match SDK
expectations. If neither is given, the service generates a UUID.

fact_type.description: Type of fact (preference, knowledge, plan, relationship)

memory_type.description: Type of memory (preference, fact, context, goal)

cookieAuth.description: JWT issued by /api/v1/auth/login, set as the access_token cookie. Configure the value in Postman's Cookies modal for the host above.
